title: JUG LCA Buildings Emission Result Item
description: One item from the emissions response array. All emission values are in kgCO2e for one building.

opening_embodied_emissions.description: Opening embodied emissions in kgCO2e for one building.

envelope_embodied_emissions.description: Envelope embodied emissions in kgCO2e for one building.

component_embodied_emissions.description: Total embodied component emissions in kgCO2e for one building.

opening_end_of_life_emissions.description: Opening end-of-life emissions in kgCO2e for one building.

envelope_end_of_life_emissions.description: Envelope end-of-life emissions in kgCO2e for one building.

component_end_of_life_emissions.description: Total component end-of-life emissions in kgCO2e for one building.
